summary: Tested (1) PWA bug fix for /demandes counter+reject and client-space alt-date inline panels — all 3 flows use inline panels (no window.prompt/confirm) and update backend correctly. (2) New AddressAutocomplete: BAN suggestions fill parts + lat/lng without Nominatim geocoding; manual postcode 49800 triggers city-select from geo.api.gouv.fr (3 cities). Also fixed a critical missing import in Clients.jsx (AddressAutocomplete/composeAddress/emptyParts were referenced but never imported — would crash at runtime on /clients when opening 'Nouveau').

issues: 'Adresse actuelle: ...' n'apparaît pas pour Sophie car c.address est vide (elle n'a que lat/lng). Conditionnel by design — mais peut confondre l'utilisateur. Envisager d'afficher aussi les lat/lng ou un texte 'Aucune adresse enregistrée' quand address est vide.

action_items: None blocking. (Optional) Consider fallback message when c.address is empty in ClientDetail Infos tab.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED by testing agent: /app/frontend/src/pages/Clients.jsx was missing the import of AddressAutocomplete, composeAddress, emptyParts from @/components/app/AddressAutocomplete — the 'Nouveau client' modal would have thrown ReferenceError on open. Added the import.

AddressAutocomplete.jsx: setPart passes coords=null to onChange, so any manual edit after picking a BAN suggestion in Clients.jsx will reset addressCoords to null (payload will omit lat/lng, triggering Nominatim fallback on backend). This is by design but worth noting — if user tweaks the street/number after picking, the BAN-provided coords are lost.

backend/app/routers/clients.py clients_create: only geocodes when c.lat is None AND c.address is set. Correct. But if address_parts is provided without composed address + no coords, no geocoding occurs. Frontend Clients.jsx composes address before POST so OK.
clients_update: re-geocodes only when address changed OR existing lat is None. Correct behaviour matches spec.
seed_data_creation: Created 5 TEST_ clients + 1 TestBAN client + 3 appointment_requests → all cleaned up in teardown/finally blocks. Sophie coords not modified (never saved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for PWA prompt/confirm and BAN address feature are fully green. One import bug in Clients.jsx was fixed. Sophie has no c.address string (only lat/lng 47.46/-0.59) so 'Adresse actuelle' block is not rendered — main agent may want to handle this UX case.
